TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_kinala, title = kinala, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/kinala} }

S.FORM: aicu a kinala nu aya, taitan a vecik, siniaya. aicu a kinala pita kai na se Paiwan kata Amerika tjian a mamav aza patarevan, pai aicua "ta kaian" kata "ita kaian" savid tu "a vocabulary" aza patarevan. kinasizuanan nua kinala aicu a ita pinaiwanan a kai aicu a patarevan na "kala" nuaya mana "linedje aravac a viljic" (aicu a sicapecapel a kala, aicu a siteqeteqic a kala). aicu a "kala" kai sa pazuljuy ta "an" a pitjaivililj sinipupatarevan tu sikudakuda tu kemudakuda. au nu qivu itjen taicua pinaka "ta kalan". aicu a ita pinaiwanan aku azua pinaka "ta kalan" kata "taitan nu vecik", nu tja cikelen a mata kinaqatian nua kinalan, aicu a "linidjinidji a kala" sinipukeljang tu "taitan katu kedrikedri" siniaya manu sika minqutanga aicu a"kinalan aya kai", ljakua aicu a "kinalan" aya kai ita kininemeneman nua se paiwan namasan "kai kata sikaian" nanga za pacugan. kaizuazua qapulu a vecik naremicing a vecik namatatevelj a vecik namacaculuculuz a kai inisedjam a kai
S.PHON: ai ¶u a kina…≠a nu aja, taitan a v…ô ¶ik, siniaja. ai ¶u a kina…≠a pita kai na s…ô paiwan kata am…ôrika ¶ian a mamav aza patar…ôvan, pai ai ¶ua "ta kaian" kata "ita kaian" savid tu "a vu ¶abu…≠arj" aza patar…ôvan. kinasizuanan nua kina…≠a ai ¶u a ita pinaiwanan a kai ai ¶u a patar…ôvan na "ka…≠a" nuaja mana "…≠in…ô…â…ô arava ¶ a vi éi ¶" (ai ¶u a si ¶ap…ô ¶ap…ô…≠ a ka…≠a, ai ¶u a sit…ôq…ôt…ôqi ¶ a ka…≠a). ai ¶u a "ka…≠a" kai sa pazu éuj ta "an" a pi ¶aivi…≠i é sinipupatar…ôvan tu sikudakuda tu k…ômudakuda. au nu qivu i ¶…ôn tai ¶ua pinaka "ta ka…≠an". ai ¶u a ita pinaiwanan aku azua pinaka "ta ka…≠an" kata "taitan nu v…ô ¶ik", nu ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠…ôn a mata kinaqatian nua kina…≠an, ai ¶u a "…≠ini…âini…âi a ka…≠a" sinipuk…ô éa≈ã tu "taitan katu k…ô…ñik…ô…ñi" siniaja manu sika minquta≈ãa ai ¶u a"kina…≠an aja kai", éakua ai ¶u a "kina…≠an" aja kai ita kinin…ôm…ôn…ôman nua s…ô paiwan namasan "kai kata sikaian" na≈ãa za pa ¶ugan. kaizuazua qapu…≠u a v…ô ¶ik nar…ômi ¶i≈ã a v…ô ¶ik namatat…ôv…ô é a v…ô ¶ik nama ¶a ¶u…≠u ¶u…≠uz a kai inis…ô…âam a kai
S.FORM: aicu a kinala nu aya, taitan a vecik, siniaya. aicu a kinala pita kai na se Paiwan kata Amerika tjian a mamav aza patarevan, pai aicua "ta kaian" kata "ita kaian" savid tu "a vocabulary" aza patarevan. kinasizuanan nua kinala aicu a ita pinaiwanan a kai aicu a patarevan na "kala" nuaya mana "linedje aravac a viljic" (aicu a sicapecapel a kala, aicu a siteqeteqic a kala). aicu a "kala" kai sa pazuljuy ta "an" a pitjaivililj sinipupatarevan tu sikudakuda tu kemudakuda. au nu qivu itjen taicua pinaka "ta kalan". aicu a ita pinaiwanan aku azua pinaka "ta kalan" kata "taitan nu vecik", nu tja cikelen a mata kinaqatian nua kinalan, aicu a "linidjinidji a kala" sinipukeljang tu "taitan katu kedrikedri" siniaya manu sika minqutanga aicu a"kinalan aya kai", ljakua aicu a "kinalan" aya kai ita kininemeneman nua se paiwan namasan "kai kata sikaian" nanga za pacugan. kaizuazua qapulu a vecik naremicing a vecik namatatevelj a vecik namacaculuculuz a kai inisedjam a kai
S.PHON: ai ¶u a kina…≠a nu aja, taitan a v…ô ¶ik, siniaja. ai ¶u a kina…≠a pita kai na s…ô paiwan kata am…ôrika ¶ian a mamav aza patar…ôvan, pai ai ¶ua "ta kaian" kata "ita kaian" savid tu "a vu ¶abu…≠arj" aza patar…ôvan. kinasizuanan nua kina…≠a ai ¶u a ita pinaiwanan a kai ai ¶u a patar…ôvan na "ka…≠a" nuaja mana "…≠in…ô…â…ô arava ¶ a vi éi ¶" (ai ¶u a si ¶ap…ô ¶ap…ô…≠ a ka…≠a, ai ¶u a sit…ôq…ôt…ôqi ¶ a ka…≠a). ai ¶u a "ka…≠a" kai sa pazu éuj ta "an" a pi ¶aivi…≠i é sinipupatar…ôvan tu sikudakuda tu k…ômudakuda. au nu qivu i ¶…ôn tai ¶ua pinaka "ta ka…≠an". ai ¶u a ita pinaiwanan aku azua pinaka "ta ka…≠an" kata "taitan nu v…ô ¶ik", nu ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠…ôn a mata kinaqatian nua kina…≠an, ai ¶u a "…≠ini…âini…âi a ka…≠a" sinipuk…ô éa≈ã tu "taitan katu k…ô…ñik…ô…ñi" siniaja manu sika minquta≈ãa ai ¶u a"kina…≠an aja kai", éakua ai ¶u a "kina…≠an" aja kai ita kinin…ôm…ôn…ôman nua s…ô paiwan namasan "kai kata sikaian" na≈ãa za pa ¶ugan. kaizuazua qapu…≠u a v…ô ¶ik nar…ômi ¶i≈ã a v…ô ¶ik namatat…ôv…ô é a v…ô ¶ik nama ¶a ¶u…≠u ¶u…≠uz a kai inis…ô…âam a kai
